summary: Completed testing of Rep Portal Commissions page and Admin Portal User Management features. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Rep Commissions page (accessible via sidebar, shows correct commission data with 4% rate = £319.96/student) and Admin Users page (lists all reps/admins, Create User modal works for creating new reps and admins). Full end-to-end flow tested: Admin creates rep → Rep can immediately login.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login returns valid token
Backend: Rep login returns valid token
Backend: GET /api/rep/commissions - returns correct structure (commissions, summary, commission_rate, per_student_gbp)
Backend: GET /api/rep/commissions - commission_rate is 4%, per_student is £319.96
Backend: GET /api/rep/commissions?status=pending/approved/paid - status filter works
Backend: GET /api/admin/users - returns list of reps and admins with correct fields
Backend: GET /api/admin/users?role=rep - role filter returns only reps
Backend: GET /api/admin/users?role=admin - role filter returns only admins
Backend: POST /api/admin/users - creates new rep with is_active=true
Backend: POST /api/admin/users - creates new admin with is_active=true
Backend: POST /api/admin/users - rejects duplicate email with 400
Backend: POST /api/admin/users - rejects invalid role (student) with 400
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/users/:userId/toggle-status - toggles user active status
Backend: Newly created rep can login immediately
Backend: Approved student (emily.watson.1773068526@test.com) can login
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions link in sidebar
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions page shows My Commissions title
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions page shows 4 summary cards (Total Earned, Pending Approval, Approved, Paid Out)
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions page shows commission rate info (4% per enrolled student, £319.96 for £7,999)
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions page shows filter buttons (All, Pending, Approved, Paid)
Frontend: Rep Portal - Commissions page shows commission table with student, enrollment, amount, status, date
Frontend: Admin Portal - Users link in sidebar
Frontend: Admin Portal - Users page shows User Management title
Frontend: Admin Portal - Users page shows 3 summary cards (Total Users, Representatives, Administrators)
Frontend: Admin Portal - Users page shows role filter buttons (All Users, Representatives, Administrators)
Frontend: Admin Portal - Users page shows users table with User, Role, Status, Performance, Joined columns
Frontend: Admin Portal - Create User button opens modal
Frontend: Admin Portal - Create User modal has Role dropdown, Name, Email, Password inputs, Generate button
Frontend: Admin Portal - Create User modal - successfully created new rep via UI
Frontend: Admin Portal - New user appears in list immediately after creation
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest and UI testing with TEST_ and timestamp prefixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rep Commissions and Admin User Management features fully tested. Rep Portal Commissions page accessible at /portal/rep/commissions via sidebar link with pound sterling icon. Admin Portal Users page accessible at /portal/admin/users via sidebar link. Admin can create new reps and admins who can login immediately (is_active=true). Commission rate is 4% of £7,999 = £319.96 per enrolled student. All 3rd party integrations (Stripe, S3, SendGrid, Twilio) remain MOCKED.

mocked_integrations_notes.aws_s3: Document upload returns mock S3 URLs

rep_commissions_page.info_banner: Commission rate: 4% per enrolled student (£319.96 for £7,999 course fee)
